title: Inventory Filter
description: Filter for a specific inventory and its required availability.

id.description: The unique identifier of the item (e.g., product or variant ID in shopping, or dish ID in food ordering).

type.description: The type of the item, helping backend routing. Well-known values: 'product' (shopping), 'dish' (food).

quantity.description: Minimum quantity required to be available at the location.
